rulings.Case Title: DION ROBERTS VS. OCWEN LOAN SERVICING LLC A BUSINESS ENTITY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 21, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT PHH MORTGAGE CORPORATION, WESTERN PROGRESSIVE, LLC, WELLS FARGO BANK DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to February 19, 2020. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provided a courtesy copy of opposition to Department 501 no later than January 31, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD YOUNG VS. MAUREEN ROWLAND ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 21, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT CHRISTINE ROWLAND, MICHAEL ROWLAND, MAUREEN ROWLAND MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication is DENIED in part and Hearing Required in part. Motion based on the 2 and 3 grounds listed in the Notice is DENIED. Hearing Required to address the first ground. The Court notes that an Amended Reply was filed a day after the original hearing date without any leave of Court. The Court will address at the hearing why the untimely amended reply should not be stricken. =(501/REQ)
